sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Surging Sparks booster packs opened, per-tier rates published with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 16.94% ±0.79, Illustration Rare 7.67% ±0.56, Ultra Rare 6.74% ±0.53, ACE SPEC 5.03% ±0.46, Special Illustration Rare 1.15% ±0.22, Hyper Rare 0.53% ±0.15. The study also explicitly validates the uniform-within-tier assumption our per-card odds rely on: every individual card's measured rate fit within the 95% CI for its rarity. Version 1 of this table used ThePriceDex's republished figures (sample undisclosed, capped low); they match this study exactly, so the numbers are unchanged — only the provenance and confidence improved.

alternateEstimates.note: A documented 500-pack opening reported 7 SIRs (~1 in 71). Against the n=8,000 primary (1 in 87, CI ±0.22%), this now reads as ordinary small-sample clustering — 7 hits at n=500 has wide error — rather than a genuine disagreement. Kept for transparency.
